lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: Hello! The name's Charlie Brown and I've just arrived in Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice to meet you Charlie, my name is [player name]. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: I've come to Kourend in search of luck, [player name]. I seek many fortunes and as you know you need luck to find fortune!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're searching for luck, why are you dressed as a monk?

lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: Ah these robes keeps me holy, I must remain holy when praying to the God of Luck, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: God of Luck? I don't think I've heard of such a God...

lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: Ah, would you perhaps allow me to enlighten you?

lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: Arengeesus, God of luck. We do not know much about her or where she comes from, we just know she is there looking over us.

lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: Those who praise Arengeesus enough to get her attention are rewarded. She will gaze down upon you providing you with luck on your adventures.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds a little farfetched to me, luck isn't a thing. Hard work is all you need.

lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: Perhaps working hard is merely a form of praise to the God of luck, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm... well good luck Charlie. Good bye!

lines.speaker: Charlie Brown
lines.text: Farewell [player name], may Arengeesus shine down upon you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time, I must be going.
